scripts.test:playwright: bun run build && bunx playwright test --update-snapshots
scripts.test:all: bun run type-check && bun run test && bun run build && bunx playwright install chromium && bun run test:playwright
scripts.regenerate-screenshot: bun run build && REGEN_SCREENSHOTS=1 bunx playwright test tests/screenshot.test.playwright.ts
scripts.publish-to-poe-tiles: bun run build && poe-tiles tiles publish
